title: GameStop Q2 2024 Earnings Summary
text: GameStop delivered mixed financial results for the second quarter of 2024, exceeding earnings expectations but falling short on revenue projections. GameStop reported a profit of $0.01 per share, surpassing analyst expectations of a $0.08 per share loss. Net sales totaled $798.3 million, falling below the projected $896 million figure. The company's net income reached $14.8 million compared to a $2.8 million net loss in the prior year's quarter. However, net sales declined significantly from $1.164 billion year-over-year. Operating expenses saw improvement, with SG&A expenses at 33.9% of net sales versus 27.7% previously. The retailer maintained a strong cash position of $4.204 billion. GameStop opted not to conduct an earnings conference call following the release, and the stock experienced volatility in after-hours trading.
